infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: LOFTE uses the microphone to log workouts by voice.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: LOFTE uses the camera to scan gym machine displays.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: LOFTE can read photos to log workout data from machine displays.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: LOFTE reads your activity, heart rate, and sleep to personalize your training insights and coaching.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: LOFTE saves your workouts to Apple Health so they count toward your activity rings.

plugins.healthSharePermission: LOFTE reads your activity, heart rate, and sleep to personalize your training insights and coaching.
